sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35327" key="e)neari/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεᾰρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n35327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐαρίζω ἐν</ref></xr>. ., c. dat., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.770b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
